ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day's data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock for which the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, which accounts for corporate actions */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual input) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the daily data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the stock exchange */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, technical, news) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the annotation is about */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_content" TEXT /* Content of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., note, alert, question) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES daily_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the discussion */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the discussion is about */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was started */,
  "discussion_content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "discussion_type" TEXT /* Type of the discussion (e.g., general, technical, news) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the discussion (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the user accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was removed from the portfolio */,
  "position_size" REAL /* Size of the position in the stock */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was sold or exited */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio entry (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
